spec.title: Duplicate Like Rate
spec.description: Optional custom metric. Useful during duplicate-like storm tests.

spec.title: Row Lock Time
spec.description: Total InnoDB row-lock wait time per second. Use together with Row Lock Wait to prove lock contention severity.

spec.title: Like Error Rate
spec.description: Non-2xx responses for like endpoint. Separate duplicate/business errors from real system failures.

spec.title: Like Business Result
spec.description: Optional custom metric. Expected labels: result="success", "duplicate", "error".

spec.title: MySQL QPS
spec.description: Overall MySQL query pressure. Compare with Like RPS to see whether DB work scales with traffic.

spec.title: MySQL SELECT/sec
spec.description: Maps mainly to existsByUserIdAndSongId and findById(song).

spec.title: MySQL INSERT/sec
spec.description: Represents successful song_favorites inserts during valid likes.

spec.title: MySQL UPDATE/sec
spec.description: Represents favorite_count increments. Watch this closely during hot-song tests.

spec.title: Like RPS vs DB Writes
spec.description: If Like RPS grows but INSERT/UPDATE does not, requests are being rejected, blocked, or failing before writes.

spec.title: Read/Write Mix
spec.description: Shows whether the like load is read-heavy, write-heavy, or dominated by duplicate checks.

spec.title: MySQL Threads Running
spec.description: How many MySQL threads are actively executing. High value with high CPU suggests DB work saturation.

spec.title: MySQL Threads Connected
spec.description: Open MySQL connections. Compare against Hikari active/idle.

spec.title: MySQL Slow Queries/sec
spec.description: If this rises during like tests, inspect query plans and lock waits.

spec.title: Latency vs Row Lock Waits
spec.description: Core bottleneck correlation: P95 rising with row-lock waits indicates DB lock contention.

spec.title: Row Lock Waits vs Lock Time
spec.description: Wait count plus wait time is stronger evidence than either metric alone.

spec.title: InnoDB Deadlocks/sec
spec.description: If available from exporter. Deadlocks indicate transactions are conflicting, not merely queued.

spec.title: Hikari Active Connections
spec.description: DB connections currently in use by the application.

spec.title: Hikari Idle Connections
spec.description: Remaining DB connection headroom.

spec.title: Hikari Pending Connections
spec.description: Requests waiting for a DB connection. Direct pool saturation signal.

spec.title: Hikari Connection Timeouts
spec.description: If this rises, requests are failing because a DB connection cannot be acquired in time.

spec.title: Tomcat Busy Threads
spec.description: Web request threads currently busy. High values indicate request queuing at the API layer.

spec.title: JVM CPU
spec.description: High JVM CPU with normal DB metrics points toward app-side work.

spec.title: GC Pause Average
spec.description: Use this to avoid mistaking JVM pauses for DB latency.

spec.title: Like P95 vs Hikari Pending
spec.description: If both rise together, the app is backing up while waiting for DB connections.

spec.title: Host CPU Usage
spec.description: If CPU is low while latency and locks are high, bottleneck is likely contention, not raw CPU.

spec.title: Memory Available %
spec.description: Rules out memory pressure as the primary cause.

spec.title: Disk I/O Time
spec.description: If this rises with MySQL latency, storage may be involved.

spec.title: Network RX/TX
spec.description: Usually not the like bottleneck, but useful to exclude network saturation.

spec.title: MySQL Up
spec.description: Must be 1 before trusting MySQL exporter metrics.

spec.title: Aborted MySQL Connections
spec.description: Rising values indicate connection failures, client disconnects, or timeout pressure.

spec.title: Like Step P95
spec.description: Optional custom timer. Expected step labels: exists_check, find_song, insert_favorite, increment_count, total.

spec.title: Like Step Average
spec.description: Optional custom timer average duration by step.
